title: digitaria fusca
intro: Digitaria fusca, also known as Black Jack or Black Finger Grass, is a species of grass that is native to tropical Africa and the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Digitaria fusca include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in the production of traditional medicine in some parts of Africa.
